all.en: Procurement has completed the annual evaluation of strategic packaging vendors.
all.zh: 採購部門已完成策略性包裝供應商的年度評估。

all.en: The assessment covered six suppliers that together represent 84 percent of category spend.
all.zh: 評估涵蓋六家供應商，合計佔該類別支出的百分之八十四。

all.en: Each vendor was scored across quality, delivery, cost, service, and sustainability.
all.zh: 每家供應商從品質、交期、成本、服務及永續性面向評分。

all.en: Performance data was collected from receiving, quality control, and accounts payable systems.
all.zh: 績效資料蒐集自收料、品管及應付帳款系統。

all.en: Vendor A achieved the highest overall score for the second consecutive year.
all.zh: 供應商 A 連續第二年獲得最高綜合分數。

all.en: Its on-time delivery rate reached 98.6 percent across all shipment categories.
all.zh: 其準時交付率在所有出貨類別中達百分之九十八點六。

all.en: Vendor B improved significantly in quality after a corrective action plan was implemented.
all.zh: 供應商 B 在實施矯正措施計畫後，品質顯著改善。

all.en: Defect rates dropped from 1,200 to 380 parts per million within nine months.
all.zh: 瑕疵率在九個月內由每百萬件一千兩百件降至三百八十件。

all.en: Vendor C remains the most cost competitive but trails on documentation accuracy.
all.zh: 供應商 C 在成本上最具競爭力，但文件正確性落後。

all.en: Vendor D demonstrated strong technical responsiveness and engineering support capability.
all.zh: 供應商 D 展現強大的技術回應與工程支援能力。

all.en: Vendor E faced supply disruptions during the second quarter due to material shortages.
all.zh: 供應商 E 因原料短缺，在第二季面臨供應中斷。

all.en: Vendor F newly joined the panel and is still being benchmarked against incumbents.
all.zh: 供應商 F 新加入合作名單，仍在與既有供應商進行比較評估。

all.en: Average price increases across the category were limited to 2.1 percent this year.
all.zh: 今年該類別整體平均價格漲幅控制在百分之二點一以內。

all.en: Several vendors offered volume rebates that delivered 1.4 million dollars in savings.
all.zh: 多家供應商提供量販回饋金，帶來一百四十萬美元的節省。

all.en: Sustainability scores improved meaningfully thanks to recycled material adoption.
all.zh: 由於採用回收料，永續性分數有實質提升。

all.en: Three suppliers now provide carbon footprint data at the shipment level.
all.zh: 三家供應商現已提供出貨層級的碳足跡資料。

all.en: Audit findings identified opportunities to strengthen subcontractor management practices.
all.zh: 稽核發現有機會強化分包商管理實務。

all.en: Procurement recommends consolidating award volumes toward the top three performers.
all.zh: 採購建議將得標數量集中至前三名表現最佳的供應商。

all.en: A formal performance improvement plan will be issued to Vendor E next month.
all.zh: 下個月將對供應商 E 發布正式績效改善計畫。

all.en: Quarterly business reviews will continue with all retained partners.
all.zh: 將持續與所有保留的合作夥伴進行季度業務檢討。

all.en: Risk management has been requested to validate single-source exposures.
all.zh: 已請風險管理單位驗證單一來源的曝險。

all.en: A follow-up evaluation will be conducted six months from today.
all.zh: 後續評估將於今日起六個月後進行。

all.en: Detailed scorecards are available through the vendor management portal.
all.zh: 詳細評分卡可透過供應商管理入口網站取得。

all.en: Questions regarding the report should be directed to the category manager.
all.zh: 如對本報告有任何疑問，請洽該類別經理。
